heading: Propagation of stock and release of germ plasm
label: 283 Propagation of stock and release of germ plasm
text: The Secretary of Agriculture may propagate bee-breeding stock and may release bee germ plasm to the public.
notes: CodificationThis section was not enacted as part of act , which comprises this chapter.Aug. 31, 1922Provisions similar to this section were contained in the following prior Department of Agriculture Appropriation Acts:, .June 28, 1944, ch. 29658 Stat. 439, .July 12, 1943, ch. 21557 Stat. 407

Amendments1981— inserted “and may release bee germ plasm to the public”.Pub. L. 97–981951—Act , struck out provisions relating to sale of surplus bee-breeding stock, and the fixing of rates and disposition of proceeds in connection therewith.Oct. 31, 1951
Effective Date of 1981 AmendmentAmendment by effective on , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. L. 97–98section 1801 of Pub. L. 97–98section 4301 of this titleDec. 22, 1981
